## Summary

`checklistMatrix.ts` had aspirational artifact names that **never matched what the runtime code actually persists** to `evaluation_artifacts`. This meant the SIPOC enforcer could never be turned on without blocking every phase — it would look for artifacts that don't exist.

**Artifact name corrections:**
```diff
# Phase 1a outputs
- story_map_verification_v1, evidence_index_v1
+ pass1a_story_layer_v1, pass1a_character_ledger_v1, pass1a_chunk_cache_v1, seed_contradiction_report_v1, ledger_quality_report_v1

# Pass 3A output
- verified_story_layer_handoff_v1
+ pass3_preflight_draft_v1

# Semantic Gate / Review Gate output
- semantic_gate_result_v1, accepted_story_context_v1
+ accepted_story_ledger_v1

# Phase 2 outputs
- criteria_evaluation_v1, criteria_recommendation_contract_v1
+ pass1_chunk_cache_v1, pass2_chunk_cache_v1 (+ pass12_handoff_v1 unchanged)

# Phase 3 outputs
- evaluation_synthesis_v1 (never existed)
+ (evaluation_result_v2 unchanged)

# WAVE output
+ revision_opportunity_ledger_v1 (was missing entirely)

# Phase 0.5a output
+ full_context_story_ledger_v1 (was missing)

# Phase 0.5b output
+ editorial_dream_seed_v1 (was missing)
```

**Missing SIPOC stage refs added:** `ADJACENT_SEED_COMPLETENESS_GATE`, `ADJACENT_REVIEW_GATE`, `ADJACENT_REVISION_LEDGER` — matching the canonical stage identifier register in `SIPOC_EVALUATION_PROCESS.md`.

Updated all downstream consumers: `checklistRuntimeWiring.ts` resume logic, all 5 enforcer/gate test suites (36 tests pass), SIPOC doc line 311, PR docs p14 and p16. The enforcer is not yet wired into `processor.ts` — this was a ticking time bomb that would have broken production the moment enforcement was enabled.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d4851c426d7b4c5eb439461fb11cc120
